prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The MOT requirements for HGVs, including retrofitted blind spot information systems, apply across the UK, including Scotland. Vehicle safety standards and MOT testing procedures are regulated at the UK national level, ensuring that all vehicles, regardless of their location within the UK, adhere to the same safety and performance standards.
